req.title: Immunization record (audit)
req.statement: A clinician shall record an Immunization with administered date not in the future. An AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation and tested end-to-end.

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-085 mandates three distinct test axes: (1) valid immunization creation by a clinician with a past/present date, (2) rejection of future dates with HTTP 422, and (3) boundary behavior at exactly today's date. An AuditEvent must be emitted and verifiable after every operation, making end-to-end audit coverage mandatory in all cases. Equivalence Partitioning separates the valid-date partition from the invalid-date partition. Boundary Value Analysis targets the today/today+1 edge. A Negative Path test covers the future-date error pathway. A State Transition Coverage test ensures the system transitions from 'no record' to 'record stored + audit emitted' atomically. Decision Table reasoning drives the audit-emission assertion across all paths.

tests.name: test_immunization_past_date_creates_record_and_audit
preconditions: Authenticated clinician token is available via <clinician_auth_token fixture>
A valid patient reference exists via <patient_ref fixture>
actions: Build an Immunization payload with occurrenceDateTime set to 30 days in the past
POST payload to /Immunization with Authorization header
Capture the Location header and response body
Query /AuditEvent filtering on the returned Immunization id
expected: Response body occurrenceDateTime matches submitted past date
At least one AuditEvent exists referencing the new Immunization id
trace: R-HLT-085: AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
import <helper_fn: post_resource>
import <helper_fn: get_audit_events>

def test_immunization_past_date_creates_record_and_audit(<clinician_auth_token>, <patient_ref>):
    occurrence = (date.today() - timedelta(days=30)).isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "COVID-19"},
        "patient": {"reference": f"Patient/{<patient_ref>}"},
        "occurrenceDateTime": occurrence
    }
    resp = post_resource("/Immunization", payload, token=<clinician_auth_token>)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["resourceType"] == "Immunization"
    assert body["occurrenceDateTime"] == occurrence
    imm_id = body["id"]
    audits = get_audit_events(entity_id=imm_id, token=<clinician_auth_token>)
    assert len(audits) >= 1
    assert any(a.get("action") == "C" for a in audits)

tests.name: test_immunization_future_date_returns_422_and_audit
preconditions: Authenticated clinician token is available via <clinician_auth_token fixture>
A valid patient reference exists via <patient_ref fixture>
actions: Build an Immunization payload with occurrenceDateTime set to tomorrow (today + 1 day)
POST payload to /Immunization with Authorization header
Capture the response status and body
expected: Response body contains an OperationOutcome or error message referencing invalid date
No Immunization resource is persisted (GET /Immunization search returns no new id)
An AuditEvent is emitted recording the failed attempt with outcome != success
trace: R-HLT-085: AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
import <helper_fn: post_resource>
import <helper_fn: search_resource>
import <helper_fn: get_audit_events_by_outcome>

def test_immunization_future_date_returns_422_and_audit(<clinician_auth_token>, <patient_ref>):
    future = (date.today() + timedelta(days=1)).isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "Influenza"},
        "patient": {"reference": f"Patient/{<patient_ref>}"},
        "occurrenceDateTime": future
    }
    resp = post_resource("/Immunization", payload, token=<clinician_auth_token>)
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert "resourceType" in body and body["resourceType"] == "OperationOutcome"
    search = search_resource("/Immunization", params={"date": future}, token=<clinician_auth_token>)
    assert search.json().get("total", 0) == 0
    failed_audits = get_audit_events_by_outcome(outcome="8", token=<clinician_auth_token>)
    assert len(failed_audits) >= 1

tests.name: test_immunization_today_boundary_accepted_and_audit
preconditions: Authenticated clinician token is available via <clinician_auth_token fixture>
A valid patient reference exists via <patient_ref fixture>
actions: Build an Immunization payload with occurrenceDateTime exactly equal to today
POST payload to /Immunization with Authorization header
Capture the Location header, response body, and resource id
Query /AuditEvent filtering on the returned Immunization id
expected: HTTP 201 Created (today is the inclusive upper boundary of valid dates)
Response body occurrenceDateTime equals today's date string
At least one AuditEvent references the new Immunization id
AuditEvent.action is 'C' and outcome indicates success
trace: R-HLT-085: administered date not in the future (boundary: today is valid)
R-HLT-085: AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date
import <helper_fn: post_resource>
import <helper_fn: get_audit_events>

def test_immunization_today_boundary_accepted_and_audit(<clinician_auth_token>, <patient_ref>):
    today = date.today().isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "Hepatitis B"},
        "patient": {"reference": f"Patient/{<patient_ref>}"},
        "occurrenceDateTime": today
    }
    resp = post_resource("/Immunization", payload, token=<clinician_auth_token>)
    assert resp.status_code == 201, f"Expected 201, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}"
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["occurrenceDateTime"] == today
    imm_id = body["id"]
    audits = get_audit_events(entity_id=imm_id, token=<clinician_auth_token>)
    assert len(audits) >= 1
    audit = audits[0]
    assert audit.get("action") == "C"
    assert audit.get("outcome") in ("0", 0)

tests.name: test_immunization_state_transition_none_to_stored_with_audit
preconditions: Authenticated clinician token is available via <clinician_auth_token fixture>
A valid patient reference exists via <patient_ref fixture>
No pre-existing Immunization record exists for the patient on the target date
actions: Confirm no Immunization exists for patient on target date (GET /Immunization?patient=<id>&date=<past>)
POST a new Immunization with a past date (14 days ago)
Verify system transitioned to 'record stored' state via GET on returned id
expected: Pre-state: 0 Immunization records for that patient+date combination
GET on new id returns HTTP 200 with matching resource
Post-state: exactly 1 AuditEvent with action='C' referencing the new resource id
trace: R-HLT-085: state transition from no record to immunization stored
R-HLT-085: AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation (end-to-end)
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
import <helper_fn: post_resource>
import <helper_fn: get_resource>
import <helper_fn: search_resource>
import <helper_fn: get_audit_events>

def test_immunization_state_transition_none_to_stored_with_audit(<clinician_auth_token>, <patient_ref>):
    target_date = (date.today() - timedelta(days=14)).isoformat()
    pre = search_resource("/Immunization",
        params={"patient": <patient_ref>, "date": target_date},
        token=<clinician_auth_token>)
    assert pre.json().get("total", 0) == 0, "Pre-condition: record must not exist"
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "MMR"},
        "patient": {"reference": f"Patient/{<patient_ref>}"},
        "occurrenceDateTime": target_date
    }
    resp = post_resource("/Immunization", payload, token=<clinician_auth_token>)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    imm_id = resp.json()["id"]
    get_resp = get_resource(f"/Immunization/{imm_id}", token=<clinician_auth_token>)
    assert get_resp.status_code == 200
    assert get_resp.json()["id"] == imm_id
    audits = get_audit_events(entity_id=imm_id, token=<clinician_auth_token>)
    assert len(audits) == 1
    assert audits[0]["action"] == "C"
